text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, April 27. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Good weekend progress on home projects. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
